title: Audit ferrolearn-bayes vs sklearn (naive_bayes + gaussian_process): close gaps, add API proof tests
description:
Step 1 of 12 in sklearn parity audit (#240).

Scope: sklearn.naive_bayes (GaussianNB, MultinomialNB, BernoulliNB, ComplementNB, CategoricalNB) and sklearn.gaussian_process (GaussianProcessRegressor, GaussianProcessClassifier, kernels). Conjugate priors module (already in ferrolearn-bayes) is a 'better-than-sklearn' extra.

Process:
1. Diff ferrolearn-bayes public API vs sklearn HEAD (1.9.dev0)
2. File or update sub-issues for missing items
3. Implement gaps
4. Add a proof-of-API integration test that exercises every public estimator end-to-end
5. Re-verify against sklearn

Related existing issues: #71 (sample_weight for all NB)
